# jvjohnson.dev resume resources

Primary resume page:
https://jvjohnson.dev/cv.html

Human-readable Markdown resume:
https://jvjohnson.dev/content/resume.md

AI and ATS scanner Markdown resume:
https://jvjohnson.dev/content/resume-ai-scanner.md

Homepage:
https://jvjohnson.dev/

Evaluation methodology:
https://jvjohnson.dev/eval-lab-methodology/

Anonymized governance case study:
https://jvjohnson.dev/projects/governance-agent-control.html

Full body of work:
https://jvjohnson.dev/projects/

Notes:
Jeffrey V. Johnson, Ph.D. is presented as an evaluations and agent-governance engineer. The portfolio connects fail-closed evaluation evidence, bounded agent authority, and evidence-preserving human review in consequential software. Private project repositories remain intentionally unlinked.
